B.Sc. Zoology.exp: Scientific study of animals covering structure, physiology, behaviour, evolution, genetics and ecology.
B.Sc. Zoology.imp: This course forms the foundation of animal sciences. It prepares students for higher studies and careers in wildlife biology, ecology, conservation, veterinary research, zoological studies and teaching.

B.Sc. Biotechnology.exp: Integration of biology with modern technology including genetics, molecular biology and bioinformatics.
B.Sc. Biotechnology.imp: This course is central to modern science and industry. It enables careers in biotechnology firms, pharmaceuticals, diagnostics, agriculture and advanced molecular research.

B.Sc. Life Sciences.exp: Interdisciplinary study of biology at molecular, cellular, organismal and ecological levels.
B.Sc. Life Sciences.imp: It provides academic flexibility and a broad base, allowing students to specialize later in diverse biological fields such as ecology, genetics or biotechnology.

B.Sc. Animal Science.exp: Study of animal nutrition, breeding, physiology, and management.
B.Sc. Animal Science.imp: Prepares for careers in livestock management, animal research, and agriculture.

B.Sc. Genetics.exp: Study of genes, heredity, genetic variation, and molecular genetics.
B.Sc. Genetics.imp: Foundation for careers in genetic counseling, research, biotechnology, and medicine.

B.Sc. Bioinformatics.exp: Integration of biology, computer science, and information technology.
B.Sc. Bioinformatics.imp: Crucial for genomic research, drug discovery, and biological data analysis.

B.Sc. Environmental Science.exp: Study of environmental systems, conservation, pollution control, and sustainable development.
B.Sc. Environmental Science.imp: Essential for careers in environmental consulting, conservation, policy-making, and sustainability management.

B.Sc. Physiology.exp: Study of biological functions and processes in living organisms.
B.Sc. Physiology.imp: Important for understanding how organisms function at cellular and systemic levels.

B.Sc. Botany.exp: Study of plant biology, classification, and ecology.
B.Sc. Botany.imp: Foundation for plant sciences and botanical research.

B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech.exp: Training in laboratory techniques for medical diagnosis and research.
B.Sc. Medical Lab Tech.imp: Prepares for careers in diagnostic laboratories and healthcare facilities.

M.Sc. Zoology.exp: Advanced animal biology covering physiology, ecology, evolution, and genetics.
M.Sc. Zoology.imp: Strong foundation for research, teaching, and specialized biological careers.

M.Sc. Animal Science.exp: Advanced animal physiology, nutrition, breeding, and management.
M.Sc. Animal Science.imp: Supports livestock industry, animal welfare, and agricultural research.

M.Sc. Wildlife Biology.exp: Advanced study of wildlife species, behavior, and conservation.
M.Sc. Wildlife Biology.imp: Essential for wildlife research, conservation projects, and doctoral studies.

M.Sc. Experimental Biology.exp: Design and execution of biological experiments and research methodologies.
M.Sc. Experimental Biology.imp: Important for research-oriented careers in biological sciences.

M.Sc. Research Methodology.exp: Scientific research methods, experimental design, and statistical analysis.
M.Sc. Research Methodology.imp: Fundamental for all scientific research careers.

M.Sc. Systems Biology.exp: Study of complex biological systems using computational models.
M.Sc. Systems Biology.imp: Cutting-edge field for understanding biological networks and interactions.

M.Sc. Evolutionary Biology.exp: Study of evolutionary processes, adaptation, and speciation.
M.Sc. Evolutionary Biology.imp: Fundamental for understanding biodiversity and biological relationships.

M.Sc. Comparative Anatomy.exp: Comparative study of anatomical structures across different species.
